case_title: ROBERT (BOBBY) DRAUGHON et al VS. STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA et al
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER DRAUGHON, ROBERT (BOBBY) SHIEBER, HOWARD (PETITIONER HOWARD SHIEBER MUST PAY COURT FEES. ORDER DENYING FEE WAIVER FILED 5/07/14. HE MUST PAY FEES OWED TO THE COURT BEFORE FILING ANY DOCUMENTS.) AS TO RESPONDENT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA CLIENT SECURITY FUND, COMMISSION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER DRAUGHON, ROBERT (BOBBY) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE HEARING SET FOR MAY-07-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-07-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER HOWARD SHIEBER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPLICANT APPEARED AND WANTED TO WITHDRAW HIS APPLICATION BUT THEN HE DECIDED THAT HE WANTED TO BE HEARD, THEREFORE THE COURT PASSED THE MATTER UNTIL THE END OF THE CALENDAR SINCE APPLICANT WAS LATE. WHEN THE MATTER WAS RECALLED AT AROUND 10:40AM, THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY THE APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO PETITIONER HOWARD SHIEBER
ORDER **AMENDED** ON COURT FEE WAIVER; ORDER GRANTED FOR ROBERT DRAUGHON

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: PETITIONER HOWARD SHIEBER MUST PAY COURT FEES. ORDER DENYING FEE WAIVER FILED ON 5/07/14. HE MUST PAY FEES OWED TO THE COURT BEFORE FILING ANY DOCUMENTS. (206)

NTC OF MTN AND MTN IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING AGENCY TO PROVIDE THE COMPLETE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD INCLUDING ALL TRANSCRIPTS OF ITS DECISION HEARING PROCEEDINGS TO INDIGENT PETITIONER FILED BY PETITIONER DRAUGHON, ROBERT (BOBBY) HEARING SET FOR FEB-13-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER DRAUGHON, ROBERT (BOBBY)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER DRAUGHON, ROBERT (BOBBY)
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-13-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, MTN IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING AGENCY TO PROVIDE THE COMPLETE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD INCLUDING ALL TRANSCRIPTS OF ITS DECISION HEARING PROCEEDINGS TO INDIGENT PETITIONER IS CONTINUED FROM FEB-13-2015 TO MAR-09-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 13, 2015 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)
ADDENDUM TO MEMO IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING AGENCY TO PROVIDE RECORD OF ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDINGS TO INDIGENT PETITIONER FILED BY PETITIONER DRAUGHON, ROBERT (BOBBY)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-09-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, MTN IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ORDER DIRECTING AGENCY TO PROVIDE THE COMPLETE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD INCLUDING ALL TRANSCRIPTS OF ITS DECISION HEARING PROCEEDINGS TO INDIGENT PETITIONER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. =302/SB
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 56986058)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn In Support Of Application For Order Directing Agency To Provide The Complete Administrative Record Including All Transcripts Of Its Decision Hearing Proceedings To Indigent Petitioner
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER ROBERT (BOBBY) DRAUGHON'S Motion in Support Of Application For Order Directing Agency To Provide The Complete Administrative Record Including All Transcripts Of Its Decision Hearing Proceedings To Indigent Petitioner is Off calendar. No proof of service.
Judge : Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/sb

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn In Support Of Application For Order Directing Agency To Provide The Complete Administrative Record Including All Transcripts Of Its Decision Hearing Proceedings To Indigent Petitioner
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Continued To Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ROBERT (BOBBY) DRAUGHON'S Motion In Support Of Application For Order Directing Agency To Provide The Complete Administrative Record Including All Transcripts Of Its Decision Hearing Proceedings To Indigent Petitioner is continued to March 9, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 13, 2015 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-07-2014 Denied
